mapper.select: SELECT co.order_id AS orderId, co.receiver_name AS receiverName, co.receiver_phone_no AS receiverPhoneNo, co.ship_to_address1 AS shipToAddress1, co.ship_to_city AS shipToCity, co.ship_to_state AS shipToState, co.ship_to_zip_code AS shipToZipCode FROM channel_order co WHERE co.seller_id = #{sellerId} AND co.invoice_no IS NULL
